projectDescription: A single GraphQL API for querying U.S. retail electricity plans, pricing, utilities, and enrollment across deregulated markets.
keyFeatures: Residential and business electricity plan lookup by ZIP code or utility ID
Component-level pricing with advertised and all-in rates at 500/1000/2000 kWh
Utility (TDU) lookup for any supported deregulated market ZIP code
Disclosure document links (EFL, TOS, YRAC, CONTRACT_SUMMARY, and more)
Utility service account search by address or account number
State-level average energy rate and generation mix data
Earliest available service start date lookup for switch or move-in
Coverage across TX, PA, OH, IL, NJ, and other deregulated U.S. markets
publicApiSurface: utilityAccounts(accountNumber, street, city, state, zipCode, isBusiness)
